summary: Starz reported first-quarter 2026 earnings Thursday revealing wider losses, largely due to content-impairment charges — but the media company gave indications it’s improving its financial position one year out from its spinoff from Lionsgate. Total revenue dropped 7.2%, to $306.9 million, and Starz posted an operating loss of -$152.8 million versus -$142.3 million in the […]
headline: Starz Sees Wider Losses in Q1 on Content-Impairment Charges as Company Marks One Year Since Lionsgate Spinoff
